github.description: GitHub MCP server for managing issues, PRs, and repositories

forgejo.description: Forgejo MCP server for repository and issue management

perplexity-ask.description: Perplexity Ask MCP server for web search and AI chat

context7.description: Context7 MCP server for framework and library documentation lookup. Use 'resolve-library-id' to find a library, then 'query-docs' to fetch its current documentation. ALWAYS use this BEFORE configuring any framework, ORM, bundler, or build tool to avoid version-specific configuration errors.

google_drive.description: Google Drive MCP server for file management

google-chat.description: Google Chat MCP server for messages and spaces. CRITICAL: To search or read Google Chat content, ALWAYS use these MCP tools (google_chat_search_all_spaces, google_chat_search_messages, google_chat_list_messages). NEVER use terminal grep/cat on local google_chat/ files — they are stale exports and will produce empty or hallucinated results.

tavily-mcp.description: Tavily MCP server for web search, crawl, extract, and research. Use for comprehensive web research, content extraction from URLs, and site mapping. Preferred fallback when Perplexity quota is exceeded.

alphaxiv.description: alphaXiv MCP server for academic paper search, embedding similarity, full-text search, and research analysis
